Contact the bakery

You can reach Example Bakery by phone or email, or simply visit our counter on Main Street in downtown Springfield.

We answer the phone during shop hours and reply to email within a day. For a custom cake or a large order, please give us a few days notice so we can plan the bake around it.

Ways to reach us

  • Phone: +1-555-0100, Tuesday to Sunday.
  • Email: hello@example.com for orders and questions.
  • In person: 1 Main Street, in the heart of downtown Springfield.
  • Custom cakes: ask at the counter, or call ahead to book a date.

Finding the shop

We are a short walk from the main square. Parking is easy on the side streets, and a bus stops around the corner from our door. For a map and directions, see our location on OpenStreetMap.

Come by during opening hours and there will be fresh bread on the shelf. We are always happy to help you choose a loaf or plan an order for your next event.

Back to the homepage

Example Bakery — 1 Main St, Springfield — +1-555-0100
